case_title: DAVIS-CHANDLER, JOHOHNNIE vs. FRESH START FARMS et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAVIS-CHANDLER, JOHOHNNIE AS TO DEFENDANT FRESH START FARMS DOES 1 TO 20 STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUL-27-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-30-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUL-07-1995
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAVIS-CHANDLER, JOHOHNNIE ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-27-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON JUL-27-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR AUG-28-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-28-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), PLAINTIFF ORDERED TO APPEAR ON 9/27/95; PLAINTIFF IS TO HAVE SERVED A PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT BEFORE 9/27/95 AND TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT 20 DAYS BEFORE 9/27/95. (IF PLAINTIFF FAILS TO COMPLY WITH COURT RULES SANCTIONS WILL BE APPLIED) NOTICE MAILED TO 860 CORBETT, #201 - PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. HEARING SET FOR SEP-27-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-27-1995, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON SEP-27-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 2ND OSC: SANCTIONS IMPOSED FOR PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO FOLLOW COURT RULES AS EXPLAINED TO HER ON 8/28/95, AND IN NOT FOLLOWING COURT RULES WHEN ASKING FOR A CONTINUANCE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-15-1995 CONTINUED FROM SEP-27-1995 TO OCT-27-1995 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-27-1995, DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO SECTIONS 581(D) AND 581(M) OF THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE AND CALIFORNIA INDEMNITY CO. -VS- SUPERIOR COURT, (1995) 36 CAL.APP. 4TH 678.
